title: 採用する番号ストリーム

cases.name: 配列とSetを順番に調べる

input.factory: () => ({ sources: [[3, 1, 2], new Set([2, 4, 5]), [6]], blocked: new Set([1, 5]), limit: 4 })

cases.name: limitに達したら途中で終える

input.factory: () => { function* nums() { yield 4; yield 6; yield 4; yield 7; } return { sources: [nums(), new Set([6, 8, 9]), [7, 10]], blocked: new Set([7]), limit: 4 }; }

cases.name: 同じIteratorを作り直さずに扱う

input.factory: () => { function* values() { yield 1; yield 2; } const shared = values(); return { sources: [shared, [2, 3], shared, [4]], blocked: new Set(), limit: 5 }; }
() => { function* nums() { yield 3; } return { sources: [[1], new Set([2]), nums()], blocked: new Set(), limit: 0 }; }

cases.name: 採用できる値がlimitより少ない

input.factory: () => { function* tail() { yield 6; yield 7; } return { sources: [[5, 5], new Set([5, 6]), tail()], blocked: new Set([7]), limit: 4 }; }
